nasb.text: “Behold, everyone who quotes proverbs will quote this proverb concerning you, saying, ‘Like mother, like daughter.’

esv.text: “Behold, everyone who uses proverbs will use this proverb about you: ‘Like mother, like daughter.’

cnv.text: “‘凡引用俗語的，必用這俗語指著你說：有其母，必有其女。

ccb.text: “‘好说俗语的人都会讥讽你说，有其母必有其女。
